personalInfo.name: Subhash Mahimaluri
personalInfo.title: Solution Architect | React Architect | Frontend Lead | Next.js | React Native | AI Engineer | 15+ Yrs
personalInfo.summary: **Solution Architect** with **15+ years** building **high-scale SaaS platforms** and **cloud-native applications** for **Fortune 500 enterprises** including Shell, National Grid, and Intuit. Expert in **Frontend Architecture (React, Next.js, Micro Frontends)**, **React Native mobile development**, and **AI/LLM Integration (RAG, Vector DBs)**. Proven hands-on engineering leader driving **end-to-end product development** and **cross-functional and distributed team delivery** across **web, iOS, and Android**. Track record of **optimizing system performance by 40%**, **reducing infrastructure costs by 25%**, and delivering **production-grade AI solutions**. Open to opportunities in Bengaluru and across India.

highlights: Led the end-to-end design and development of **PlanBPass**, a production-grade **AI-driven SaaS platform** delivering structured decision support across **Web, iOS, and Android**

Architected the complete product stack including **Next.js / React** web frontend, **React Native** mobile applications, **Node.js** services, **Supabase/PostgreSQL** backend, and cloud infrastructure

Designed and implemented a production-ready **AI Advisor system**, leveraging **LLM orchestration**, **Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)**, and advanced prompt engineering to deliver context-aware, reliable responses

Built and shipped **React Native CLI** mobile apps with **Push Notifications (FCM/APNs)**, **Social Authentication (Google, Apple)**, **Subscriptions**, and **In-App Purchases**, ensuring full **App Store** and **Play Store** compliance
Successfully published and managed live mobile applications on **Apple App Store** and **Google Play Store**, owning release pipelines, versioning, and store review processes
Delivered high-performance web experiences, achieving **100/100 Lighthouse scores** through optimized **React**, **Next.js**, and **TypeScript** implementations with sub-second load times

projects.name: GatheredHQ — Digital Menu & Restaurant SaaS
description: Led the end-to-end migration of **GatheredHQ** from a Base44 prototype to a production-grade **Next.js SaaS platform**, establishing a scalable foundation for long-term growth
Architected a multi-restaurant, role-based SaaS backend using **Supabase (PostgreSQL)** with **Row Level Security (RLS)**, supporting Owners, Managers, and Waiters across multiple restaurants
Designed and implemented a centralized backend architecture, enabling seamless consumption by Web (**Next.js**) and future mobile applications, independent of frontend uptime
Built a secure onboarding and restaurant setup flow, allowing owners to create and manage multiple restaurants, staff roles, menus, and QR-based public menu pages
Implemented high-performance, SEO-friendly public menu pages with optimized **Next.js rendering** and mobile-first UX
Established Agile delivery process as Product Owner, working closely with the client through weekly sprints, pilot feedback, and iterative feature refinement
Delivered a live MVP within one week, enabling real-world pilot deployment in a restaurant environment
Ensured production readiness through schema design, migrations, defect stabilization, and QA workflows during pilot rollout

highlights: Led **enterprise-grade SaaS applications** and **cross-functional engineering teams** for **Fortune 500 clients** including Shell and National Grid
Designed **CI/CD pipelines** reducing deployment cycles from **weekly to daily** with **90%+ test coverage**

projects.name: National Grid UK
description: Built enterprise UI with **Next.js (SSR)**, **React 18**, **TypeScript** with reusable component architecture
Designed **AWS CI/CD pipelines (CodePipeline, Lambda, S3, CloudFront)** → weekly to daily deployments
Achieved **90%+ test coverage** with **Vitest & Playwright** and **25% faster API responses**
Owned **frontend architecture** decisions, standards enforcement, and cross-team collaboration

projects.name: Shell AI Assistant
description: Designed **enterprise AI assistant** using **OpenAI-based LLMs** and **production RAG pipelines**, **FAISS/Pinecone**, **Node.js microservices**
Fine-tuned GPT models → **reduced support tickets by 20%** with context-aware responses
Integrated **Azure services (CosmosDB, Redis Cache) → 25% lower latency**, **15% infrastructure savings**

projects.name: Shell FleetHub Modernization
description: Led **React 18 + TypeScript** modernization with **Redux Toolkit + RTK Query → 40% faster load times**
Adopted **Micro-Frontend architecture** with **Module Federation** for independent deployments
Optimized **Azure cloud infrastructure** with **Auto Scaling**, **Load Balancers**, **Redis caching**

highlights: Delivered **full-stack SaaS projects** for **fintech and e-commerce clients** using **React**, **TypeScript**, **Node.js**, **GraphQL**, **AWS**
Architected **Node.js APIs** with **MongoDB & DynamoDB** serving **100K+ daily users**
Deployed **serverless microservices (AWS Lambda)** with **CloudFront CDN → 40% performance improvement**
Built **component libraries & design systems** reducing development effort by **25%**
Owned **full-stack delivery** for **Intuit QuickBooks Online** with **React**, **TypeScript**, **Node.js**, **GraphQL**
Developed **60+ SEO-optimized landing pages** driving global SMB adoption
Migrated to **React Hooks → 30% frontend performance boost** with **95%+ test coverage**
Automated **AWS deployments (Lambda, EC2, CloudFront)** ensuring **high availability** for millions of users
Led **React, Redux, Webpack** development for **Time Inc** media brands
Built **design system & component library → 25% faster site builds** across global teams
Implemented **code-splitting & lazy loading → 40% Lighthouse/SEO improvement**
Drove **WCAG 2.0 AA accessibility** compliance and SEO optimization
